crime.value: Mother's death (possibly murder) and father's death in house fire
crime.quote: It's all my fault, i'm the reason she's gone!

victim.value: Kora's mother, killed due to some conflict involving Kora; father died in house fire
victim.quote: I'm the one who fought with her, I'm the one who made her leave, I'm the one who just stood there as she was being killed

culprit_and_motive.value: Scratch and his men, motive unclear but connected to mother's death
culprit_and_motive.quote: After all it's your fault she's dead!

resolution.value: No clear resolution - story ends with Kora and Romeo dying
resolution.quote: We then close our eyes for the final time.

investigator.value: Kora herself, the protagonist trying to understand her mother's death
investigator.quote: I try to think back to what happened to my mother, then it hits me.

red_herring.value: The mysterious savior who repeatedly rescues Kora appears supernatural but is revealed to be Romeo
red_herring.quote: I don't know why, it feels safe now knowing there is some mysterious person i have never met protecting me

social_world.value: Father-daughter relationship broken by grief; criminal underworld with Scratch as authority figure
social_world.quote: Father says nothing, he just sits there staring at nothing

reveal_mechanic.value: Kora's repressed memory surfaces under Scratch's interrogation, revealing her role in mother's death
reveal_mechanic.quote: I try to think back to what happened to my mother, then it hits me. 'He's right.' I say to Romeo.

investigator_wound.value: Kora's guilt over her mother's death and her inability to save her father from grief
investigator_wound.quote: It's all my fault, i'm the reason she's gone! If i wasn't so selfish she would still be alive.
